name: Miglior Canned Cat Food -Game Chunks, 405g
shortDescription: (4 pieces minimum order)Miglior Cat Food Game Chunks delivers tender game meat, natural enzymes, and nutrient-packed veggies in a savory gravy, ensuring complete nutrition and enhanced wellness.
description: COMPOSITION: Meat and animal derivatives 30% (game 5%), cereals, minerals. ANALYTICAL CONSTITUENTS: Moisture 77%, Crude protein 8.5%, Crude fat 4.8%, Crude fibres 0.5%, Crude ash 3%. Nutritional additives / kg: Vitamin E 10 mg, Copper (Copper(II) sulphate pentahydrate) 2 mg. HOW TO USE: The product is ready to use. STORAGE INSTRUCTION: Store the product in a cool and dry place, avoiding direct sunlight. Once opened, store in refrigerator for 2-3 days
